title: Vidiot
description: Vidiot is a self-contained 3U instrument: a shape generator, 2D keyer, and two-channel open-architecture modulator/oscillator, designed as an entry point to analog video before you commit to a full 84 HP row. Controls, I/O, and sound-to-video ideas are in the Manual. Panel data: Specs.

seo.title: Vidiot | LZX Industries
seo.description: Vidiot: 3U analog video instrument. Manual, Specs, and hub on lzxindustries.com.
